<summary>策展过滤模块的文件已创建，现在运行`curation_filter.py`验证其过滤功能。</summary>

```python
import curation_filter
# Running the example usage block within curation_filter.py
# This will load rules, add some, set a min date, apply filters,
# save results, and list summaries.
if __name__ == "__main__":
    curator = curation_filter.CurationFilter()
    curator.list_rules()

    curator.add_keyword_rule("LLM", "include")
    curator.add_keyword_rule("Agent", "include")
    curator.add_keyword_rule("Blockchain", "exclude")
    curator.set_min_date("2026-03-25")
    curator.list_rules()

    filtered = curator.apply_filters()
    
    print(f"\nTotal articles after filtering: {len(filtered)}")
    
    with open('filtered_articles_with_status.json', 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        json.dump(filtered, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)
    print("Filtered articles with status saved to 'filtered_articles_with_status.json'")

    curator.list_filtered_articles_summary("pending_review")
    curator.list_filtered_articles_summary("rejected_keyword_exclude")
    curator.list_filtered_articles_summary("rejected_date")
    curator.list_filtered_articles_summary("rejected_keyword_include_missing")

    curator.remove_keyword_rule("LLM", "include")
    curator.remove_keyword_rule("Agent", "include")
    curator.remove_keyword_rule("Blockchain", "exclude")
    curator.set_min_date("1970-01-01")
    curator.list_rules()
```🛠️ **正在调用工具:** `code_run`  📥**参数:**
````text
{
  "type": "python",
  "timeout": 60,
  "cwd": null
}
````

<summary>策展过滤模块的文件已创建，现在运行`curation_filter.py`验证其过滤功能。</summary>

```python
import curation_filter
# Running the example usage block within curation_filter.py
# This will load rules, add some, set a min date, apply filters,
# save results, and list summaries.
if __name__ == "__main__":
    curator = curation_filter.CurationFilter()
    curator.list_rules()

    curator.add_keyword_rule("LLM", "include")
    curator.add_keyword_rule("Agent", "include")
    curator.add_keyword_rule("Blockchain", "exclude")
    curator.set_min_date("2026-03-25")
    curator.list_rules()

    filtered = curator.apply_filters()
    
    print(f"\nTotal articles after filtering: {len(filtered)}")
    
    with open('filtered_articles_with_status.json', 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        json.dump(filtered, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)
    print("Filtered articles with status saved to 'filtered_articles_with_status.json'")

    curator.list_filtered_articles_summary("pending_review")
    curator.list_filtered_articles_summary("rejected_keyword_exclude")
    curator.list_filtered_articles_summary("rejected_date")
    curator.list_filtered_articles_summary("rejected_keyword_include_missing")

    curator.remove_keyword_rule("LLM", "include")
    curator.remove_keyword_rule("Agent", "include")
    curator.remove_keyword_rule("Blockchain", "exclude")
    curator.set_min_date("1970-01-01")
    curator.list_rules()
```🛠️ **正在调用工具:** `code_run`  📥**参数:**

agent_trace.summary: [已完成] AI技术周报万户级配额与1:10分解口径已制定。

article_curation_target.description: 精选并摘要的核心文章

rss_source_scope.description: 指定AI相关RSS源的监控与管理

decomposition_rule.level_description: 逐级1:10分解，确保统一口径
decomposition_rule.tumen_level: 万户（Tumen）：负责一个完整的「AI技术周报」生产周期，包括每周产出1份包含5篇精选文章的周报，并管理10个指定RSS源。
decomposition_rule.mingghan_level: 千户（Mingghan）：将万户职责分解为10个工作单元。每个千户可负责处理1个RSS源的完整流程（从监控到初步筛选出潜在文章），或负责周报生产流程中的特定环节（如文章深度评估、摘要编辑、排版发布等），确保最终汇总满足万户目标。
decomposition_rule.jaghun_level: 百户（Jaghun）：将千户职责分解为10个更小的执行单元。例如，如果千户负责处理1个RSS源，百户可负责该源中特定主题的文章筛选，或文章摘要的初稿撰写。
decomposition_rule.arban_level: 十户（Arban）：将百户职责分解为10个最小执行单元。例如，负责对单篇文章进行关键词提取、内容初读或格式检查等。

reporting_cycle.tumen_level: 万户（Tumen）：每周一发布周报，并提交万户级产出报告。
reporting_cycle.mingghan_level: 千户（Mingghan）：每周五提交其负责环节的进展报告。
reporting_cycle.jaghun_level: 百户（Jaghun）：每日提交任务执行日志。
reporting_cycle.arban_level: 十户（Arban）：实时更新任务状态。

mingghan_allocations.title: RSS源识别与初步筛选
mingghan_allocations.description: 识别并初步分类所有可用的RSS订阅源，为后续AI相关源的精选做准备。

mingghan_allocations.title: AI相关源精选与验证
mingghan_allocations.description: 从初步筛选的RSS源中，精选并验证与AI团队高度相关的订阅源列表。

mingghan_allocations.title: 第一批文章元数据获取
mingghan_allocations.description: 从部分精选的AI相关RSS源中，获取第一批文章的标题和摘要。

mingghan_allocations.title: 第二批文章元数据获取
mingghan_allocations.description: 从剩余精选的AI相关RSS源中，获取第二批文章的标题和摘要。

mingghan_allocations.title: 元数据初步筛选与相关性评估
mingghan_allocations.description: 对所有获取的文章元数据进行初步筛选，评估其与AI周报主题的相关性。

mingghan_allocations.title: 核心文章内容提取 (Part 1)
mingghan_allocations.description: 根据相关性评估结果，提取第一批核心文章的完整内容。

mingghan_allocations.title: 核心文章内容提取 (Part 2)
mingghan_allocations.description: 提取第二批核心文章的完整内容，补充周报素材。

mingghan_allocations.title: 周报内容草拟与结构化
mingghan_allocations.description: 整合已提取的核心文章内容，草拟周报主体，并进行结构化编排。

mingghan_allocations.title: 周报引言与结论撰写
mingghan_allocations.description: 撰写技术周报的引言、结论及整体概述，确保内容连贯性和吸引力。

mingghan_allocations.title: 最终审核与发布准备
mingghan_allocations.description: 对整理完成的周报进行最终审核，确认内容准确无误，并准备发布所需信息（如收件人列表）。

risks: RSS服务稳定性可能影响文章获取效率。
RSS源内容与AI团队相关性可能不足，导致筛选工作量增加。
文章内容自动提取的准确性可能存在偏差，需要人工复核。

jaghun_allocations.title: RSS Feed Source Identification
jaghun_allocations.description: Identify and maintain a list of relevant RSS feeds for AI news and research.

jaghun_allocations.title: Article Acquisition Management
jaghun_allocations.description: Manage the process of fetching new articles from all identified RSS feeds.

jaghun_allocations.title: Initial AI Relevance Screening
jaghun_allocations.description: Oversee the preliminary screening of acquired articles for general AI relevance.

jaghun_allocations.title: Deep AI Team Relevance Analysis
jaghun_allocations.description: Manage the detailed analysis to filter articles specifically relevant to the AI team's current projects/interests.

jaghun_allocations.title: Content Summarization Oversight
jaghun_allocations.description: Supervise the summarization of selected articles and extraction of key takeaways for the newsletter.

jaghun_allocations.title: Newsletter Content Assembly Management
jaghun_allocations.description: Coordinate the assembly of summarized content into a coherent newsletter draft, including introductions and conclusions.

jaghun_allocations.title: Technical Review Coordination
jaghun_allocations.description: Manage the technical review process for accuracy and clarity of the drafted newsletter content.

jaghun_allocations.title: Editorial & Formatting Quality Assurance
jaghun_allocations.description: Ensure the newsletter meets editorial standards for grammar, style, and proper formatting for readability.

jaghun_allocations.title: Recipient List Maintenance
jaghun_allocations.description: Maintain and verify the accuracy of the recipient list for the AI team's technical weekly report.

jaghun_allocations.title: Publication Readiness & Scheduling
jaghun_allocations.description: Oversee the final preparation for publication and ensure distribution channels are ready.
